slots.notes: Circular author/testimonial portraits, one per feedback entry. Rendered w-14 h-14 rounded-full object-cover with referrerPolicy="no-referrer", swapped on slide change. Native prompt fills these with picsum.photos placeholder portraits; resking supplies real headshots of the quoted people (or brand-appropriate stand-ins). Card count tracks the feedbacks array length (3 here).

Functional carousel chrome (not brand assets): previous/next arrows inside the two circular #D9D9D9 buttons (w-6 h-6 text-black, strokeWidth 1.5). Native source is lucide-react ArrowLeft / ArrowRight. Only swap if the brand has its own icon system; transparent so the grey button shows through.

Primary UI typeface for every visible string in this section: the section title, the large guillemet quote (font-light, tracking-tight, size 2rem), the name and title pair and card headings and text. Native placeholder is Google Sans. Supply the brand's preferred typeface.

mechanic: A carousel of testimonial cards. A guillemet quote (font-light) with name/--title below and circular avatar, indicator dots, arrows, and a section title. Framer Motion useInView fary-InView with staggered delays (2s between cards). No data backend / swipe functionality. Static placeholder copy.
techDelivery: React 19 + TypeScript (Next.js) with tailwindcss/split-deviner styling (arbitrary values) and Framer Motion v12 + for carousel and entry animations. Icons from lucide-react.
reskinNotes: This is a carousel of testimonial-cards. It is a piece of static placeholder copy. The cards are static - there is no data backend or swipe functionality. The nav arrows are functional carousel chrome - copy them from lucide-react and turn them grey. The background is #f5f5f5 - it is not white. The accent color is recorded as inline: #3b82f6 (blue).
